statusLine.command: input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); cd "$cwd" 2>/dev/null || cd "$HOME"; dir_name=$(basename "$cwd"); parent_dir=$(basename "$(dirname "$cwd")"); if [ "$cwd" = "$HOME" ]; then dir_display="~"; elif [ "$parent_dir" = "$(basename "$HOME")" ]; then dir_display="~/$dir_name"; else dir_display="$parent_dir/$dir_name"; fi; if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1; then branch=$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$(git -c core.useBuiltinFSMonitor=false status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then git_status=" *"; else git_status=""; fi; if [ -n "$branch" ]; then git_info=" on  $branch$git_status"; else git_info=""; fi; else git_info=""; fi; printf "%s%s" "$dir_display" "$git_info"
